title: grubby bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[8.40-68.0.1]
- Handle cleanup of modules.* for RHCK and UEK [Orabug: 18493431]
- Pick a suitable default kernel to boot if the current option is removed [Orabug: 22738301]
- Set whatever entry before saved entry
- Set different titles for RHCK and UEK [Orabug: 18504756] (Kevin Lyons)
- Do not add /boot twice for btrfs subvolumes [Orabug: 34380742]

[8.40-68]
- Update cfg when setting a default kernel
  Resolves: #RHEL-106612

[8.40-67]
- Bump NVR
- Related: #RHEL-61421

[8.40-66]
- grubby-bls: on PPC systems, remove petiboot's version checks
- Resolves: #RHEL-61421

[8.40-65]
- On grub cfg updates, run grub2-mkconfig for Xen systems
  Resolves: #RHEL-50691
full_text:
[8.40-68.0.1]
- Handle cleanup of modules.* for RHCK and UEK [Orabug: 18493431]
- Pick a suitable default kernel to boot if the current option is removed [Orabug: 22738301]
- Set whatever entry before saved entry
- Set different titles for RHCK and UEK [Orabug: 18504756] (Kevin Lyons)
- Do not add /boot twice for btrfs subvolumes [Orabug: 34380742]

[8.40-68]
- Update cfg when setting a default kernel
  Resolves: #RHEL-106612

[8.40-67]
- Bump NVR
- Related: #RHEL-61421

[8.40-66]
- grubby-bls: on PPC systems, remove petiboot's version checks
- Resolves: #RHEL-61421

[8.40-65]
- On grub cfg updates, run grub2-mkconfig for Xen systems
  Resolves: #RHEL-50691

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20556-0.html
